Container.Name: example-host-privileged
Container.Overview: Advanced example: host network and privileged container. Replace YOUR_IMAGE before use.
Container.Description:
## Warning
**Host network** shares the Unraid host network namespace. **Privileged** grants extended capabilities.
Only use this pattern when: - The upstream project requires host networking (e.g. some discovery protocols). - Hardware access requires privileged mode or explicit device passthrough.
Prefer `bridge` networking and `Device` Config entries over privileged mode when possible.

Config.Name: GPU Device (optional)
Config.Description: Pass through GPU device node when required. Leave the value set (empty Device entries emit --device='' and break container start).
